name: coding-agents
description: 対象 jobsite の Git root に .coding-agents 状態を置き、サブエージェント開発チームで intake / planning / execution / audit、DEBUG 根本原因ゲート、metacognitive repair/debug gate を行う。

interface.shortDescription: Target-repo intake, agent-team execution, audit, debug gates, and context-impact checks.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the jobsite or explicit --target-cwd repository, stores .coding-agents state under that target git root, and coordinates intake, planning, execution material, audit, debug root-cause integrity, and metacognitive context-impact checks through a parent agent and scoped specialist subagents.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake for this target repo.
Plan this coding task with scoped subagents.
Normalize stale debugging integrity state for this target repo.
Debug this task with root cause, fix, intended-outcome verification, and context-impact checks.
